text.title: Facebook Ads Playbook Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply this methodology end-to-end.

step.name: audit-account-and-page
step.action: Check account age, Page Quality Score, AEM configuration.
step.decision-gate: If Page < Standard, fix before launch.

step.name: pick-placements
step.action: Feed + Reels + Marketplace by default; exclude Audience Network unless data justifies.

step.name: forecast-learning-phase
step.action: Confirm ≥50 conv/wk forecast within 14 days per ad set; else split budget or pause.
